title: Security mindset
lede: Cybersecurity - bu faqat hack emas. Professional darajada u aktivlarni aniqlash, riskni baholash, nazorat qo'yish va hodisaga tayyor turish jarayonidir.
doc:
Asosiy maqsad

Xavfsizlikning vazifasi biznesni to'xtatish emas, uni xavfsiz ishlatish. Shuning uchun savol doim shunday: nimani himoya qilamiz, kimdan, qanday ehtimol bilan va qanday zarar bo'ladi?

AssetThreatVulnerabilityRiskControl

CIA triad

TamoyilMa'noMisol
Confidentialitymaxfiylikparol hash, access control
Integritybutunlikaudit log, checksum, review
Availabilitymavjudlikbackup, monitoring, DDoS himoya

Etika

Professional kiberxavfsizlikda ruxsat, scope va yozma kelishuv majburiy. Real tizimni tekshirish faqat egasining aniq ruxsati bilan qilinadi. Kursdagi amaliyotlar lokal lab, CTF yoki o'zingga tegishli demo muhitda bajariladi.

Professional qoida

Qila olamanmi degan savoldan oldin: ruxsat bormi, scope qayergacha, zararni qanday oldini olaman va natijani qanday hujjatlashtiraman?

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools kursi cyber crime, money-making threats, dark web, networking, attacks, security operations va incident response kabi 16 ta asosiy sahifani ketma-ket beradi. Bu modul o'sha roadmapni professional risk tili bilan bog'laydi: threat, vulnerability, impact, likelihood va control.

heading.p: Har bir topilmani oddiy jadvalga tushir.

code.title: Risk baholash shabloni
code.code:
Asset: customer database
Threat: stolen credentials
Vulnerability: no MFA for admin users
Impact: high
Likelihood: medium
Risk: high
Control: require MFA, rotate sessions, alert on new device login
Owner: platform team
Due date: 14 days

tasks.html: CIA triadni o'z so'zim bilan tushuntirdim
tasks.crit: har biri uchun real misol bor
scope, ruxsat, zarar oldini olish bor
impact, likelihood, owner va control bor

tasks.html: W3Schools Cyber Security Tutorial roadmapini ko rib chiqdim

resources.desc: Risk va xavfsizlik boshqaruvi uchun framework

resources.title: W3Schools Cyber Security Tutorial
resources.desc: Intro course map: cyber crime, networking, attacks, defence, quiz and study plan

resources.title: W3Schools - Cyber Crime
resources.desc: Basic cyber crime concepts for beginner context

project.title: Mini risk assessment
project.desc: Oddiy web ilova yoki shaxsiy loyiha uchun aktivlar, risklar va nazoratlar jadvalini tuz.
rubric: Har risk uchun amaliy control bor.
Texnik va biznes ta'sir alohida yozilgan.

variants.title: Startup app risk review
variants.desc: Login, database, payment va admin panel risklarini bahola.

quiz.w: Confidentiality - ma'lumotni ruxsatsiz ko'rishdan himoya qiladi.
Risk odatda ta'sir va ehtimollik bilan baholanadi.

quiz.q: Professional test uchun birinchi shart nima?
quiz.w: Ruxsat va scope bo'lmasa test qilinmaydi.
Control - riskni kamaytirish yoki aniqlash chorasi.

quiz.q: W3Schools intro kursi nimaga yaxshi primer bo'ladi?
a: cybersecurity domenlarini umumiy ko rish uchun
quiz.w: W3Schools intro sahifasi turli cyber security domenlariga kirish beradi.

exercises.q: Admin panelga MFA qo'shish qaysi control turiga yaqin?
exercises.why: MFA ruxsatsiz kirishni oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Availability - tizim kerak paytda ishlashi.

vocab.ex: A customer database is a critical asset.
The test scope includes only the staging API.

grammar.rule: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability xavfsizlikning uch poydevori.
grammar.ex: Backup availability uchun, hashing integrity uchun.

grammar.rule: Asset + threat + vulnerability + impact + likelihood + control.
grammar.ex: Admin account + stolen password + no MFA = high risk.

title: Network basics
lede: Hujum ham, himoya ham trafikdan boshlanadi. TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP va TLS'ni tushunsang, log, firewall, proxy va detection ancha ravshan bo'ladi.
doc:
Minimal tarmoq xaritasi

Brauzer URL ochganda odatda DNS so'rovi, TCP handshake, TLS handshake va HTTP request ketadi. Security engineer shu bosqichlarning qaysisida muammo bo'lishini ko'ra olishi kerak.

QatlamBilish kerakSecurity savol
DNSdomain -> IPdomain spoofing yoki sinkhole bormi?
TCPport, session, handshakeqaysi port ochiq va keraklimi?
TLSsertifikat, encryptionsertifikat to'g'rimi, zaif protokol yo'qmi?
HTTPmethod, header, statusauth, cookie, CORS, caching xavfsizmi?

Packet va log

Professional ishda har doim packet capture kerak bo'lmaydi, lekin Wireshark yoki tcpdump bilan trafikni o'qiy olish detection va troubleshootingni tezlashtiradi.

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools networking sahifasi OSI modelni 7 qatlamga ajratadi: application, presentation, session, transport, network, data link va physical. Firewalls sahifasi ingress/egress trafik, Layer 4 firewall, NGFW va segmentationni alohida tushuntiradi. Shu sababli bu modulda trafik baseline bilan birga firewall zone va allowed flow jadvali ham tuziladi.

code.title: Asosiy tekshiruv buyruqlari
code.code:
dig example.com
curl -I https://example.com
openssl s_client -connect example.com:443 -servername example.com
ss -tulpn
# Lab muhitida packet ko'rish:
tcpdump -i lo port 3000

tasks.html: DNS -> TCP -> TLS -> HTTP oqimini chizdim

tasks.crit: faqat ruxsatli sayt yoki lokal app

tasks.html: OSI 7 qatlamini security misollar bilan yozdim
tasks.crit: har qatlamga kamida bitta protocol yoki control bor

project.desc: Lokal web app uchun normal trafik baseline tuz: DNS kerakmi, portlar, headerlar, TLS holati.

quiz.w: DNS domain nomini IP manzilga yechadi.
TLS maxfiylik va server autentifikatsiyasi beradi.
Ochiq portlar attack surface bo'lishi mumkin.
curl -I HEAD so'rov qilib headerlarni ko'rsatadi.

quiz.q: NGFW Layer 4 firewalldan nimasi bilan kengroq?
a: application, user, session kabi kontekstni ham ko ra oladi
quiz.w: NGFW ko'proq qatlam va kontekst bo'yicha nazorat beradi.

exercises.why: CSP brauzerda zararli script riskini kamaytiradi.
HTTPS uchun standart port 443.
Segmentation zonalar orasidagi trafikni nazorat qiladi.

grammar.rule: Avval nom yechimi, keyin port, keyin TLS, keyin HTTP tekshiriladi.

title: Linux lab
lede: Linuxni bilish - log o'qish, ruxsatlarni tushunish, servislarni boshqarish, container va cloud muhitida o'zini yo'qotmaslik degani.
doc:
Asosiy yo'nalishlar

users/groupspermissionssystemdlogsfirewall

Least privilege

Har servis va foydalanuvchi faqat kerakli huquqqa ega bo'lishi kerak. Root bilan doimiy ishlash professional amaliyot emas.

Loglarni o'qish

Auth log, web server log, application log va system journal - incident paytida birinchi qaraladigan manbalar. Vaqt zonasi, user, IP, process va exit code kabi maydonlarga e'tibor ber.

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools mapping va port scanning mavzusi asset discovery fikrini beradi. Bu kursda u faqat ruxsatli lab inventari sifatida ishlatiladi: qaysi host bor, qaysi port ochiq, qaysi servis kerakli va qaysi biri yopilishi kerak.

code.title: Asosiy buyruqlar
code.code:
id
sudo adduser appuser
sudo usermod -aG sudo appuser
chmod 640 /etc/myapp/config.env
systemctl status ssh
journalctl -u ssh --since "1 hour ago"
sudo ufw status verbose

tasks.html: Demo servis uchun least privilege user reja yozdim
Ruxsatli lab uchun port inventory jadvali tuzdim
tasks.crit: host, port, service, owner, kerakmi/yo'qmi ustunlari bor

resources.title: W3Schools - Mapping and Port Scanning
resources.desc: Network mapping and port scanning concepts for authorized lab use

project.title: Secure demo server checklist
project.desc: Demo server uchun user, permission, firewall, log va backup bo'yicha hardening checklist tuz.
rubric: Har band uchun buyruq yoki dalil bor.

quiz.w: Least privilege - minimal kerakli huquq.
journalctl systemd journal loglarini ko'rsatadi.

quiz.q: chmod 777 config fayl uchun nega xavfli?
quiz.w: 777 maxfiy config uchun juda keng huquq.
Firewall trafikni qoida asosida ruxsatlaydi yoki bloklaydi.

exercises.why: 640 owner/group bilan cheklash uchun yaxshiroq boshlang'ich tanlov.

exercises.q: Linuxda servis loglarini o'qish uchun ko'p ishlatiladigan command: ____.
exercises.why: journalctl systemd loglarini o'qiydi.

vocab.ex: Permissions control who can read a file.
The ssh service runs in the background.

grammar.rule: r = read, w = write, x = execute; owner/group/other alohida baholanadi.
grammar.ex: 640: owner rw, group r, other none.

title: Web AppSec
lede: Web security professional uchun OWASP Top 10, auth, session, input validation, output encoding, CORS, CSRF va security headerlar kundalik mavzu.
doc:
Himoya nuqtai nazari

Zaifliklarni bilishdan maqsad real tizimga zarar yetkazish emas, ilovani xavfsiz loyihalash va tekshirish. Har amaliyot lokal demo, CTF yoki ruxsatli staging muhitda bajariladi.

Eng ko'p uchraydigan risklar

RiskSababHimoya
Injectioninput queryga qo'shiladiparameterized query, validation
XSSishonilmagan HTML chiqadiescaping, CSP, sanitization
Broken access controlserverda tekshiruv yo'qdeny by default, policy test
CSRFcookie avtomatik yuboriladiSameSite, token, origin check

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools Web Application Attacks sahifasi IDOR, magic numbers, GUID/UUID va SQL injection kabi mavzularni sodda ko'rsatadi. Bu modul ularni professional AppSec checklistga aylantiradi: object-level authorization, unguessable identifiers, parameterized queries va regression test.

code.title: Node/Postgres misoli

tasks.html: Demo app uchun auth va access control checklist yozdim
Input validation va output encoding farqini tushuntirdim
IDOR uchun object-level authorization test yozdim

resources.desc: Web application basics before attack and defence review

project.desc: Demo login tizimini auth, session, rate limit, reset flow va access control bo'yicha review qil.

quiz.w: Parameterized query inputni query kodidan ajratadi.
Frontend yordamchi, server tekshiruvi majburiy.
CSP script manbalarini cheklaydi.
Cookie avtomatik yuborilgani uchun CSRF cookie authda muhim.

quiz.q: Magic number riskini kamaytirish uchun nima foydali, lekin yetarli emas?
quiz.w: UUID enumerationni qiyinlashtiradi, lekin authorization baribir majburiy.

exercises.q: User faqat o'z invoice'ini ko'rishi kerak. Qaysi himoya?
exercises.why: Har obyektga kirishda foydalanuvchi huquqi tekshiriladi.
Content-Security-Policy XSS ta'sirini kamaytiradi.

exercises.q: IDORni eng yaxshi kamaytiradigan server-side nazorat?
exercises.why: UUID yordam beradi, lekin asosiy himoya serverdagi ownership/access check.

vocab.ex: Authorization must happen on the server.
CSP limits where scripts can load from.

grammar.rule: Input validate, output encode, server authorize, secrets protect, logs monitor.
grammar.ex: Every admin endpoint checks role on the server.

title: Identity & crypto
mtitle: Parol, token va crypto xatolarini kamaytirish
lede: Ko'p breachlar credential bilan boshlanadi. Identity security - MFA, session, password hashing, secret management va audit demak.
doc:
Auth vs authorization

Authentication - kim ekaningni tasdiqlash. Authorization - nima qilishga huquqing borligini tekshirish. Ikkalasi aralashsa, broken access control paydo bo'ladi.

Crypto qoidasi

O'zing crypto algoritm yaratma. Standart, tekshirilgan kutubxona va konfiguratsiyadan foydalan. Parollar encryption qilinmaydi, sekin password hash bilan saqlanadi.

MFAbcrypt/argon2short-lived tokensecret rotation

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools passwords mavzusi credential xavfini boshlang'ich darajada ochadi. Bu modulda u MFA, password hashing, session expiry, reset flow va secret rotation bilan professional identity hardening rejasiga kengaytiriladi.

code.title: Node misoli

tasks.html: W3Schools password mavzusidan credential risk checklist chiqardim
tasks.crit: password reuse, brute force, reset, MFA bandlari bor

resources.title: W3Schools - Passwords
resources.desc: Password threats and safe password handling basics

project.title: Auth hardening plan
project.desc: Demo ilova uchun login, reset password, session, MFA va secret management bo'yicha hardening plan tuz.

quiz.w: Parollar bcrypt/argon2 kabi sekin hash bilan saqlanadi.
Adminlar yuqori riskli hisoblar.
Authorization ruxsatni tekshiradi.

quiz.q: Secret leak bo'lsa birinchi amaliy choralar?
quiz.w: Secret rotate qilinadi va foydalanish izlari tekshiriladi.

exercises.why: Base64 shifrlash ham, hash ham emas.
Authentication - identity tasdiqlash.

vocab.ex: Passwords should be hashed, not encrypted.

grammar.rule: AuthN = kimligini bilish; AuthZ = ruxsatini tekshirish.
grammar.ex: Logged in user still may not access admin panel.

title: Cloud & DevSecOps
lede: Cloud securityda eng ko'p xato IAM, public bucket, secret, network exposure va noto'g'ri container image sozlamalarida bo'ladi. DevSecOps bu nazoratlarni jarayonga qo'shadi.
doc:
Shared responsibility

Cloud provider datacenter va managed service poydevorini beradi. Lekin identity, config, data access, network exposure va app security ko'pincha sening javobgarliging.

SDLC nazoratlari

Designthreat model, data flow
Codesecure review, secret scan
BuildSCA, SAST, dependency pin
Deployconfig review, rollback

Container hardening

non-root userminimal imagepinned versionsecret outside image

W3Schools mapping

Cloud va DevSecOps modulida W3Schools firewall segmentation g'oyasi cloud security group, subnet, admin access va container exposurega ko'chirildi. Har public endpoint intentional bo'lishi va egasi aniq yozilishi kerak.

code.title: Node container
code.code:
FROM node:22-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --omit=dev
COPY . .
RUN addgroup -S app && adduser -S app -G app
USER app
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

code.title: GitHub Actions skeleton
code.code:
name: security-checks
on: [pull_request]
jobs:
  checks:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm audit --audit-level=high
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run build

public port, owner, reason, control ustunlari bor

quiz.q: Container ichida root user nima uchun xavf?
quiz.w: Root container escape yoki noto'g'ri mountda riskni oshiradi.
Image qatlamlarida secret qolib ketishi mumkin.
Software Composition Analysis dependency va license risklarini ko'radi.
IAM policy minimal action va resource bilan yoziladi.

exercises.q: Dockerfileda USER app nima uchun kerak?
exercises.why: Servis minimal huquqli user bilan ishlaydi.
SCA dependency risklarini tekshiradi.

grammar.rule: Minimal image, non-root user, pinned deps, secret outside image.
grammar.ex: Use USER app and do not COPY .env.

grammar.rule: Design, code, build, deploy bosqichlarida alohida security control bo'ladi.
grammar.ex: Design: threat model; build: SCA; deploy: config review.

title: Blue team & SOC
lede: Blue teamning kuchi - tizimda nima normal, nima shubhali ekanini bilish. Log, SIEM, alert, triage va threat hunting shu yerda birlashadi.
doc:
Detection pipeline

Log yig'iladi, normalizatsiya qilinadi, qoida yoki analytics ishlaydi, alert chiqadi, analyst triage qiladi. Yaxshi detection aniq, tushunarli va false positive past bo'ladi.

LogQimmat maydonShubhali signal
authuser, IP, resultko'p failed login
webpath, status, user-agentadmin endpointga g'alati urinish
cloudprincipal, action, resourceyangi admin policy

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools Security Operations sahifasi SOC vazifasi threatlarni aniqlash va qimmat muammoga aylanishidan oldin to'xtatish ekanini tushuntiradi. SIEM loglardan event va alert chiqaradi; network, host va application eventlari turli darajada kontekst beradi.

code.title: Failed login signal
code.code:
Rule: Possible brute force
Data source: authentication logs
Condition: same IP has >= 10 failed logins in 5 minutes
Triage: check target user, source IP reputation, successful login after failures
Response: lock account if needed, require MFA, block IP if confirmed

tasks.html: 3 xil log manbasi va maydonlarini yozdim
tasks.crit: auth, web, cloud yoki endpoint bor

tasks.html: MITRE ATT&CK bilan bitta signalni xaritaladim
Network, host va application eventlarini taqqosladim
tasks.crit: har biri uchun signal va cheklov yozilgan

resources.title: W3Schools - Security Operations
resources.desc: SOC, SIEM, events, incidents and security operations roles

project.title: Mini detection pack
project.desc: Login, admin change va suspicious web path uchun 3 ta detection rule va triage playbook yoz.

quiz.w: SIEM loglarni markazlashgan tahlil qiladi.

a: xavf yo'q lekin alert chiqqan holat
quiz.w: False positive analyst vaqtini oladi.

quiz.q: Detection rule uchun eng muhim narsa?
quiz.w: Log manbasi bo'lmasa rule ishlamaydi.
Triage alert haqiqiymi va qanchalik jiddiyligini aniqlaydi.

exercises.q: 10 failed login va keyin success nimaga signal bo'lishi mumkin?
exercises.why: Failedlardan keyin success account compromise bo'lishi mumkin.
Triage alertni baholash jarayoni.

exercises.q: Application log SOC uchun nega qimmat?
options: user action va auth kontekstini beradi
exercises.why: Application log foydalanuvchi harakati va auth kontekstini beradi.

grammar.rule: Data source + condition + threshold + triage + response.
grammar.ex: Auth logs + 10 failures/5m + check success after failures.

title: IR & capstone
lede: Breach bo'lganda eng muhim narsa - tartib. Prepare, detect, contain, eradicate, recover va lessons learned jarayoni oldindan tayyor bo'lishi kerak.
doc:
IR lifecycle

BosqichMaqsadMisol
Prepareoldindan tayyorgarlikcontacts, logs, backup
Detecthodisani ko'rishalert, report, anomaly
Containzararni cheklashtoken revoke, isolate host
Eradicatesababni yo'qotishpatch, remove persistence
Recoverxizmatni tiklashrestore, monitor

Evidence

Log va dalillarni saqlashda vaqt, manba, kim olgani va o'zgarmaganini qayd et. IRda shoshilib log o'chirish eng yomon odatlardan biri.

Capstone

Kurs oxirida professional portfolio uchun defensiv security pack tayyorlaysan: risk assessment, secure config review, detection rules va IR playbook.

W3Schools mapping

W3Schools Incident Response sahifasi incidentni adverse threat sifatida ta'riflaydi va IRT tarkibida security, IT operations, network, development, legal va HR kabi rollar bo'lishi mumkinligini ko'rsatadi. PICERL/NIST-SP 800-61 yondashuvi preparationdan lessons learnedgacha tartibli javob beradi.

code.title: Credential incident
code.code:
Trigger: token or API key exposed
1. Validate exposure and scope
2. Revoke or rotate affected secret
3. Search logs for use of the secret
4. Identify affected systems and data
5. Patch root cause (pipeline, repo, access)
6. Monitor for repeated attempts
7. Write lessons learned

code.title: Topilma shabloni
code.code:
Title: Missing authorization on invoice endpoint
Severity: High
Scope: staging API only
Impact: user may access another user's invoice metadata
Evidence: request/response IDs redacted
Root cause: object ownership not checked server-side
Fix: enforce owner check in service layer and add tests
Verification: repeat request returns 403

tasks.crit: rotate, log search, root cause bor
risk, AppSec, detection, IR hujjatlari bor
security, IT, legal, HR yoki management rollari bor

resources.title: W3Schools - Penetration Testing
resources.desc: Penetration testing and social engineering overview for ethical scope discussion

project.title: Professional Cyber Defense Pack
project.desc: Bitta demo ilova uchun to'liq defensiv security portfolio tayyorla.
rubric: Hamma ish ruxsatli lab yoki o'z demo muhitida.
Har topilma dalil, risk va fix bilan berilgan.
Portfolio ish beruvchi ko'ra oladigan darajada tartibli.

variants.title: SOC-ready pack
variants.desc: Detection va IRga urg'u berilgan variant.

variants.title: AppSec-ready pack
variants.desc: Web app security reviewga urg'u berilgan variant.

quiz.w: Containment hodisa tarqalishini cheklaydi.
Exposure to'xtashi uchun secret rotate qilinadi.

quiz.q: Yaxshi finding nimani o'z ichiga oladi?
quiz.w: Finding qaror va tuzatish uchun yetarli bo'lishi kerak.
Lessons learned jarayonni yaxshilaydi.

quiz.q: IRT tarkibiga faqat security mutaxassislar kiradimi?
a: yo'q, IT, legal, HR va boshqalar ham kerak bo'lishi mumkin
quiz.w: Incident response ko'p jamoali jarayon bo'lishi mumkin.

exercises.why: Log dalil va timeline uchun kerak.
Containment incident tarqalishini cheklaydi.

vocab.ex: The timeline shows when access happened.

grammar.rule: Prepare -> Detect -> Contain -> Eradicate -> Recover -> Lessons learned.
grammar.ex: Credential leak: rotate, search logs, fix root cause.

grammar.rule: Risk + AppSec + Detection + IR hujjatlari bir joyga jamlanadi.
grammar.ex: Executive summary non-technical odamga ham tushunarli bo'lishi kerak.

title: Endpoint & forensics
mtitle: Kompyuterda nima bo'lganini dalil bilan tushuntirish
lede: Security xodimi faqat alert ko'rmaydi; u hostda nima bo'lganini, qaysi process ishlaganini, qaysi user kirganini va qanday dalil borligini tartibli ko'rsatadi.
doc:
Endpoint triage nimadan boshlanadi?

Endpoint hodisasida maqsad - vahima qilmasdan minimal dalilni yo'qotmaslik: vaqt, user, process, network connection, persistence, file change va loglarni tekshirish. Bu modul hujum qilishni emas, ruxsatli labda tekshiruv va dalil yig'ishni o'rgatadi.

Yo'nalishTekshiruvNatija
Processqaysi jarayon ishlayapti?nom, PID, parent, command line
Networkqaysi ulanishlar bor?local/remote IP, port, process
Persistenceqayta yuklanganda nima ishga tushadi?service, startup entry, scheduled task
Evidencedalil o'zgarmadimi?hash, vaqt, manba

Amaliy ish standarti

Har tekshiruvda bitta qoida: buyruqni yoz, vaqtni yoz, natijani qisqa izohla, xulosani dalilga bog'la. "Menimcha" emas, "logda shunday ko'rindi".

code.title: Linux triage checklist
code.code:
date -u
hostname
who
last -n 20
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head
ss -tulpn
systemctl --type=service --state=running
find /tmp -maxdepth 2 -type f -mtime -1 -ls
journalctl --since "2 hours ago" --no-pager

code.title: Dalil qaydi
code.code:
Time UTC: 2026-06-27T10:15:00Z
Host: lab-web-01
Command: ss -tulpn
Observation: node process listening on 0.0.0.0:3000
Evidence file: evidence/ss-tulpn.txt
Hash: sha256:<hash>
Conclusion: public listener exists; verify firewall and reverse proxy exposure

rubric: Dalillar o'zgarmaganini ko'rsatish uchun hash bor.
Report texnik va executive qismga bo'lingan.

quiz.w: Dalil, vaqt va buyruq qaydi professional triage uchun zarur.
Timeline hodisa rivojini tushunishga yordam beradi.
Hash dalil integritysini tekshirishga yordam beradi.

exercises.q: Triage paytida birinchi xulosa qanday bo'lishi kerak?
exercises.why: Professional xulosa dalil va kuzatuvga tayanadi.

exercises.q: Dalil o'zgarmaganini tekshirish uchun ko'p ishlatiladigan qiymat: ____.
exercises.why: Hash dalil integritysini ko'rsatadi.

vocab.ex: Persistence may appear as a service.
A timeline links alerts to host activity.

grammar.ex: ss output shows process listening on public interface.

title: Vulnerability management
mtitle: Topilmani ticket, fix va verificationgacha olib borish
lede: Real ishda security xodim mingta zaiflikni ko'radi. Professional farq - hammasini bir xil ko'rmasdan, asset criticality, exploitability, exposure va biznes ta'sir bo'yicha prioritet berish.
doc:
Vulnerability management sikli

Inventar -> scan -> triage -> owner -> fix -> verification -> exception. Bu jarayon hujjatsiz bo'lsa, scan natijalari shunchaki shovqin bo'lib qoladi.

SignalSavolQaror
CVSS highinternetga ochiqmi?public bo'lsa tezroq
Known exploitedKEV yoki exploit bormi?emergency patch
Critical assetdata yoki authga ta'siri bormi?business owner bilan kelishish
Compensating controlWAF, segmentation, config bormi?riskni vaqtincha kamaytirish

Amaliy ish standarti

Har zaiflik ticketida asset, evidence, risk, owner, due date, fix guidance va verification qadam bo'lishi kerak. "Update qiling" yetarli emas; qaysi package, qaysi versiya, qanday tekshirish yoziladi.

code.title: Vulnerability ticket
code.code:
Title: Outdated nginx image on public web gateway
Asset: web-gateway-prod
Exposure: internet-facing
Severity: High
Evidence: image nginx:1.23, advisory CVE-XXXX
Owner: platform team
Fix: upgrade to nginx:1.26-alpine and rebuild image
Due: 7 days
Verification: image digest updated, scanner no longer reports CVE, smoke test passes

tasks.crit: public/internal, data sensitivity, owner ustunlari bor
CVSSdan tashqari exposure va exploitability ham bor
owner, due date, fix guidance va verification bor
before/after dalil va test natijasi bor

project.title: 30-day remediation board
project.desc: Demo tashkilot uchun 10 ta zaiflikdan iborat remediation board tuz: prioritet, owner, due date, fix va verification.

quiz.q: CVSS high har doim birinchi tuzatiladimi?
a: yo'q, exposure va asset criticality ham muhim
quiz.w: CVSS muhim, lekin kontekst bilan qaraladi.
Owner, fix va verification bo'lmasa ticket yopilmaydi.

a: riskni vaqtincha qabul qilish va hujjatlashtirish
quiz.w: Risk acceptance muddatli va asosli bo'lishi kerak.

exercises.q: Internetga ochiq auth serverdagi KEV zaiflik qaysi prioritet?
exercises.why: Public exposure va known exploited signal juda yuqori risk.
Verification ticketni yopishdan oldingi dalil.

grammar.rule: Inventory -> scan -> triage -> owner -> fix -> verify -> report.
grammar.ex: High CVSS on public auth service becomes emergency priority.

title: GRC & audit
mtitle: Security ishini auditga yaroqli qilib yuritish
lede: Kompaniyada security faqat texnik emas: policy, control owner, evidence, exception, vendor risk va audit savollariga javob bera olish ham real ishning katta qismi.
doc:
GRC nima beradi?

GRC xavfsizlik ishini tartibga soladi: kim javobgar, qaysi control bor, dalil qayerda, qachon tekshirilgan va risk kim tomonidan qabul qilingan. Bu byurokratiya emas; yaxshi GRC securityni takrorlanadigan qiladi.

ControlEvidenceOwner
Admin MFA enabledIdP policy screenshot/exportIT
Backup restore testedrestore test reportPlatform
Security review for PRsPR checklist samplesEngineering
Incident playbook existsapproved playbook linkSecurity

Amaliy ish standarti

Har control uchun bitta evidence yetarli emas: evidence yangiligi, kim tasdiqlagani va control real ishlashini ko'rsatish kerak. Auditga tayyor xodim dalilni tez topadi va tushuntira oladi.

code.title: Control jadval namunasi
code.code:
Control ID: IAM-01
Control: Admin accounts require MFA
Owner: IT Operations
Frequency: continuous
Evidence: IdP MFA policy export, admin group list
Test: sample 5 admin users and verify MFA enforced
Status: implemented
Exception: break-glass account reviewed monthly

tasks.crit: data, access, logging, incident response bo'limlari bor

tasks.html: Audit uchun evidence naming standard yozdim
tasks.crit: date, control ID, source format bor

resources.title: NIST CSF
resources.desc: Govern, Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover framework

project.title: Audit-ready evidence pack
project.desc: Demo kompaniya uchun 10 control, evidence link, owner va audit test qadamlaridan iborat GRC pack tayyorla.

quiz.w: Owner bo'lmasa control qarovsiz qoladi.
Audit evidence tekshiriladigan va kontekstli bo'lishi kerak.
Exceptionlar vaqtinchalik va qayta ko'riladigan bo'lishi kerak.

exercises.q: Admin MFA control uchun eng yaxshi evidence?
options: IdP policy export + admin group sample
exercises.why: Policy va sample evidence control real ishlashini ko'rsatadi.
GRC xavfsizlik boshqaruvi va audit ishlarini tartiblaydi.

vocab.ex: The control matrix maps evidence to owners.

grammar.rule: Control + owner + evidence + frequency + test + status.
grammar.ex: IAM-01 requires MFA for all admin accounts.

title: Job simulation
lede: Bu yakuniy modulda sen kursdagi hamma ko'nikmani bitta real ish oqimiga yig'asan: dushanba risk, seshanba AppSec, chorshanba SOC, payshanba IR, juma executive report.
doc:
Ish haftasi ssenariysi

Senga demo kompaniya beriladi: public web app, admin panel, cloud deploy, CI pipeline va loglar. Vazifa - xavfsizlik holatini baholash, topilmalarni prioritetlash, detection yozish, incident playbook tayyorlash va rahbariyatga qisqa hisobot berish.

KunRolDeliverable
1Security analystasset inventory + risk register
2AppSec analystsecure review + findings
3SOC analystdetection rules + triage notes
4IR analystincident timeline + containment plan
5Security ownerexecutive report + 30-day roadmap

Bitiruvchi talabi

Kursni tugatgan odam real ishda kamida quyidagilarni qila olishi kerak: risk register tuzish, web security finding yozish, logdan signal chiqarish, incident playbook yuritish, patch verification qilish va security holatini oddiy tilda tushuntirish.

heading.p: Ish beruvchiga ko'rsatish mumkin bo'lgan portfolio.

code.title: Executive report
code.code:
1. Executive summary
2. Scope and assumptions
3. Top 5 risks
4. Evidence-based findings
5. Detection coverage
6. Incident response readiness
7. 30-day remediation roadmap
8. Appendix: commands, logs, screenshots, tickets

code.title: Remediation plan
code.code:
Week 1: enforce MFA for admins, close public debug port
Week 2: fix object-level authorization and add regression tests
Week 3: add SIEM rules for failed login and admin changes
Week 4: run restore test, tabletop IR exercise, update evidence pack

tasks.html: 1-kun: asset inventory va risk register topshirdim

tasks.crit: kamida 3 finding, severity, fix, verification bor
3 rule, log source, triage, false positive note bor
timeline, roles, containment, lessons learned bor
README, evidence, reports, tickets, detections bor

project.title: Security analyst portfolio dossier
project.desc: Bitta demo kompaniya uchun 5 kunlik security assessmentni to'liq portfolio dossier sifatida topshir.
rubric: Har deliverable ish joyida ishlatishga tayyor.

variants.title: SOC Analyst track
variants.desc: Detection, triage va incident responsega urg'u berilgan yakuniy portfolio.

variants.title: AppSec Analyst track
variants.desc: Secure code review, web findings va fix verificationga urg'u berilgan portfolio.

variants.title: Cloud Security track
variants.desc: IAM, container, secret va exposure reviewga urg'u berilgan portfolio.

quiz.w: Capstone ish joyida kerak bo'ladigan hujjat va qarorlarni mashq qiladi.
Executive report risk va prioritetni oddiy tilda tushuntiradi.

a: dalil, report, ticket, detection va roadmap
quiz.w: Portfolio ish beruvchiga real ko'nikmani ko'rsatishi kerak.

options: eng yuqori risk va tez yutishlar
exercises.why: Roadmap risk va biznes ta'sir bo'yicha prioritetlanadi.

exercises.q: Rahbariyat uchun qisqa xavfsizlik hisobot turi: ____ report.
exercises.why: Executive report texnik bo'lmagan odamga tushunarli bo'ladi.

vocab.ex: The deliverable is an audit-ready report.

grammar.rule: Har ish natijasi dalil, qaror va keyingi qadam bilan tugaydi.
